products.description: From the anime series "Tokyo Revengers" comes this PVC statue. It stands approx. 16 cm tall.

products.name: Spy x Family S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Yor Forger 15 cm
products.description:
Yor Forger from the television anime series "SPY x FAMILY" joins S.H.Figuarts! Accessories include the weapons she uses as Thorn Princess.

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expressions, Two optional pairs of hands, Weapons

products.name: Godzilla S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Godzilla (1954) 70th Anniversary Special Version 15 cm
products.description: Tamashii Nations presents, as part of the S.H. Monster Arts collection, the figure of Godzilla (1954) 70th Anniversary Special Version. He measures 15 cm and is based on his appearance in the movie 'Godzilla (1954)'. Contains 1x pair of hands, heat ray radiation effect parts, 1x 70th Anniversary stand and 2x aeroplane parts.

products.name: Tekken S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Kazuya Mishima (Tekken 8) 15 cm
products.description:
Kazuya Mishima, from the latest entry in the ever-popular 3D fighting game series TEKKEN 8, joins S.H.Figuarts! His outfit is rendered in fine detail, letting you re-create battles right on your desktop!

Set Contents: Main Body, Two optional heads, Two left and three right optional hands, Background sheet

products.name: Avengers: Endgame S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Thanos (Five Years Later - 2023) (The Infinity Saga) 19 cm
products.description:
Five years have passed since the release of "Avengers: Infinity War." Given that "Avengers: Endgame" was set in 2023, we're excited to release a new recolor of Thanos, designed to even better capture his on-screen appearance! Combine it with the Iron Man Mark 85 (Renewal Ver.) (Avengers: Endgame) (sold separately) to re-create the epic climax of "Avengers: Infinity War!"

Set Contents: Main body, Optional head, Two pairs of optional hands, Nano gauntlet set, Sword

products.name: Monster Hunter S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Zinogre 20th Anniversary Edition 29 cm
products.description:
ZINOGRE -20th Anniversary Edition- from the MONSTER HUNTER SERIES joins S.H.MonsterArts with faithful sculpting, posability, and detail!
[Set Contents] Main Body, Claw parts (L/R) (Front), Claw parts (L/R) (Rear), Electrical effect parts, 20th Anniversary Edition stand

products.name: Dandadan S.H.Figuarts Action Figure Momo 14 cm
products.description: This detailed action figure from Tamashii Nations' "S.H.Figuarts" series comes with "Dandadan". It is approx. 14 cm tall and comes with accessories in a window box.

products.name: Godzilla: Singular Point S.H. MonsterArts Action Figure Jet Jaguar (2021) 16 cm
products.description: The 2021 incarnation of Jet Jaguar, as seen in "Godzilla S.P. ," joins S.H.MonsterArts! Overseen by Eiji Yamamori, who handled the designs for the animated series, it's a faithful portrayal of the heroic machine. It utilizes translucent parts for accurate detail, while shoulders and elbows incorporate flexible materials for natural posability. The set includes options for replicating three forms of Jet Jaguar: as he appeared during the climactic battle, with an Anglias spear for Jet Jaguar ß, and with a flight pack for Jet Jaguar ß flight mode. Also includes an unpainted Yun Arikawa figure that can ride on Jet Jaguar ß's shoulder in flight mode! Set Contents: Main Body, Two pairs of optional hands, Optional antenna (L/R), Angilas Spear, Flight Unit, Yun Arikawa achromatic figure, Flight mode support pillar and stand
